title: 3D Firework Rockets - From A Minecraft Movie
description: A 3D model of the Firework Rocket from A Minecraft Movie.
body:
A 3D model of the Firework Rocket from A Minecraft Movie. (You can make a pack of rockets, just like in the movie)

![FireWork Rockets... Also good for propulsion!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9fe841f2d7193643a9d8be69fb10751529f38ce_0.webp)

![Crossbow + Firework to make a pack of Rockets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3043a16c89a8a92293d02ed58a89eeca6dfe859.png)
